acronym: massive interests matching engine · flag football

seo.title: MIME-FF · pickup flag football that forms itself
seo.description: a free, open source platform that connects people with the same interest. when enough gather in one area, a game is born.

hero.heading: massive interests attract. a game is born.
hero.body: MIME-FF is a free, open source platform for community organization and engagement. it connects people who want the same thing - and when enough gather in one area, a game forms on its own.
hero.gate: show interest to see interest. tell us where you are, and we'll show how many like-minded folks are nearby.
hero.note: free on the web. location is your zip and city.

how.title: someone names a spot
how.body: a local suggests place and time.

faq.a: the web version is free. gear links are affiliate and cover hosting.

faq.q: what if no one's near me?
faq.a: there's no game yet. you'll see the interest count. once it's high enough, the app starts putting one together.
whoever suggests one. people on the ground know the good spots.

faq.q: why show interest before i can see anything?
faq.a: a count only means something if everyone in it is real. show interest, and you see the others who did the same.

register.seoDescription: tell us where you are and we'll show how many folks nearby want a flag football game going.
register.heading: show interest
register.blurb: tell us where you are. once you're in, you'll see how many folks nearby want the same thing.
register.note: we ask for your email, name, and zip. that's all.
